scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w cli
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start -w backend & npm run preview -w frontend
scripts.start:frontend: npm run build:frontend && npm run preview -w frontend
scripts.start:backend: npm run build:backend && npm run start -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend
